items.title: Schedule follow-up call with Boris Vaynberg about fundraising round
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4: 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning. Please let me know which day works better for you.' In response to Richie asking to touch base on the round they're pulling together.

items.title: Schedule urgent call with Gabriel Kreiman about new term sheet and round structure changes
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: 'The round construction has changed significantly since we last talked. We received a new term sheet. Before signing term sheets, we wanted to see if there's a way for us to work together. Do you have a few minutes to catch up?'

items.title: Share ballpark commit amount with Barak Perelman for ~$15-20M round at $75-90M pre-money
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'It will help me make the internal process quicker if you could share a ballpark amount of what you'd like to commit if we end up with a round of about $15-$20m at $75m-$90m pre money valuation.'

items.title: Follow up with Barak for post-board-meeting updates on round
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'We actually have our board meeting tomorrow, so I think I'll have concrete updates to share by early next week.' Board meeting was Jun 4 - updates should be available now.

items.title: Prep for Workday quarterly catch-up meeting on Jun 10
items.context: Calendar event 'Workday <> Fin Capital Quarterly Catch-up' on Jun 10 with Workday attendees (michael.magaro@workday.com, barbry.mcgann@workday.com, sarah.ospina@workday.com, and others). Recurring LP/strategic meeting.

items.title: Prep for quarterly catch-up with Alex Tung at Portage on Jun 10
items.context: Calendar event 'Derek (Fin Capital) // Alex (Portage)' on Jun 10 - recurring quarterly meeting with atung@portageinvest.com.
